ChangeServerLifeCycleState.name: ChangeServerLifeCycleState
ChangeServerLifeCycleState.documentation: Allows the user to set the SourceServer.LifeCycle.state property for specific Source Server IDs to one of the following: READY_FOR_TEST or READY_FOR_CUTOVER. This command only works if the Source Server is already launchable (dataReplicationInfo.lagDuration is not null.)

CreateNetworkMigrationDefinition.name: CreateNetworkMigrationDefinition
CreateNetworkMigrationDefinition.documentation: Creates a new network migration definition that specifies the source and target network configuration for a migration.

DeleteLaunchConfigurationTemplate.name: DeleteLaunchConfigurationTemplate
DeleteLaunchConfigurationTemplate.documentation: Deletes a single Launch Configuration Template by ID.

DeleteNetworkMigrationDefinition.name: DeleteNetworkMigrationDefinition
DeleteNetworkMigrationDefinition.documentation: Deletes a network migration definition. This operation removes the migration definition and all associated metadata.

DeleteReplicationConfigurationTemplate.name: DeleteReplicationConfigurationTemplate
DeleteReplicationConfigurationTemplate.documentation: Deletes a single Replication Configuration Template by ID

DeleteSourceServer.name: DeleteSourceServer
DeleteSourceServer.documentation: Deletes a single source server by ID.

DeleteVcenterClient.name: DeleteVcenterClient
DeleteVcenterClient.documentation: Deletes a given vCenter client by ID.

DescribeJobLogItems.name: DescribeJobLogItems
DescribeJobLogItems.documentation: Retrieves detailed job log items with paging.

DescribeJobs.name: DescribeJobs
DescribeJobs.documentation: Returns a list of Jobs. Use the JobsID and fromDate and toData filters to limit which jobs are returned. The response is sorted by creationDataTime - latest date first. Jobs are normally created by the StartTest, StartCutover, and TerminateTargetInstances APIs. Jobs are also created by DiagnosticLaunch and TerminateDiagnosticInstances, which are APIs available only to *Support* and only used in response to relevant support tickets.

DescribeLaunchConfigurationTemplates.name: DescribeLaunchConfigurationTemplates
DescribeLaunchConfigurationTemplates.documentation: Lists all Launch Configuration Templates, filtered by Launch Configuration Template IDs

DescribeReplicationConfigurationTemplate.name: DescribeReplicationConfigurationTemplates
DescribeReplicationConfigurationTemplate.documentation: Lists all ReplicationConfigurationTemplates, filtered by Source Server IDs.

DescribeSourceServers.name: DescribeSourceServers
DescribeSourceServers.documentation: Retrieves all SourceServers or multiple SourceServers by ID.

DescribeVcenterClients.name: DescribeVcenterClients
DescribeVcenterClients.documentation: Returns a list of the installed vCenter clients.

DisconnectFromService.name: DisconnectFromService
DisconnectFromService.documentation: Disconnects specific Source Servers from Application Migration Service. Data replication is stopped immediately. All AWS resources created by Application Migration Service for enabling the replication of these source servers will be terminated / deleted within 90 minutes. Launched Test or Cutover instances will NOT be terminated. If the agent on the source server has not been prevented from communicating with the Application Migration Service service, then it will receive a command to uninstall itself (within approximately 10 minutes). The following properties of the SourceServer will be changed immediately: dataReplicationInfo.dataReplicationState will be set to DISCONNECTED; The totalStorageBytes property for each of dataReplicationInfo.replicatedDisks will be set to zero; dataReplicationInfo.lagDuration and dataReplicationInfo.lagDuration will be nullified.

FinalizeCutover.name: FinalizeCutover
FinalizeCutover.documentation: Finalizes the cutover immediately for specific Source Servers. All AWS resources created by Application Migration Service for enabling the replication of these source servers will be terminated / deleted within 90 minutes. Launched Test or Cutover instances will NOT be terminated. The AWS Replication Agent will receive a command to uninstall itself (within 10 minutes). The following properties of the SourceServer will be changed immediately: dataReplicationInfo.dataReplicationState will be changed to DISCONNECTED; The SourceServer.lifeCycle.state will be changed to CUTOVER; The totalStorageBytes property fo each of dataReplicationInfo.replicatedDisks will be set to zero; dataReplicationInfo.lagDuration and dataReplicationInfo.lagDuration will be nullified.

GetLaunchConfiguration.name: GetLaunchConfiguration
GetLaunchConfiguration.documentation: Lists all LaunchConfigurations available, filtered by Source Server IDs.

GetNetworkMigrationDefinition.name: GetNetworkMigrationDefinition
GetNetworkMigrationDefinition.documentation: Retrieves the details of a network migration definition including source and target configurations.

GetNetworkMigrationMapperSegmentConstruc.name: GetNetworkMigrationMapperSegmentConstruct
GetNetworkMigrationMapperSegmentConstruc.documentation: Retrieves detailed information about a specific construct within a mapper segment, including its properties and configuration data.

GetReplicationConfiguration.name: GetReplicationConfiguration
GetReplicationConfiguration.documentation: Lists all ReplicationConfigurations, filtered by Source Server ID.

ListApplications.name: ListApplications
ListApplications.documentation: Retrieves all applications or multiple applications by ID.

ListImportFileEnrichments.name: ListImportFileEnrichments
ListImportFileEnrichments.documentation: Lists import file enrichment jobs with optional filtering by job IDs.

ListNetworkMigrationAnalyses.name: ListNetworkMigrationAnalyses
ListNetworkMigrationAnalyses.documentation: Lists network migration analysis jobs for a specified execution. Returns information about analysis job status and results.

ListNetworkMigrationAnalysisResults.name: ListNetworkMigrationAnalysisResults
ListNetworkMigrationAnalysisResults.documentation: Lists the results of network migration analyses, showing connectivity and compatibility findings for migrated resources.

ListNetworkMigrationCodeGenerationSegmen.name: ListNetworkMigrationCodeGenerationSegments
ListNetworkMigrationCodeGenerationSegmen.documentation: Lists code generation segments, which represent individual infrastructure components generated as code templates.

ListNetworkMigrationCodeGenerations.name: ListNetworkMigrationCodeGenerations
ListNetworkMigrationCodeGenerations.documentation: Lists network migration code generation jobs, which convert network mappings into infrastructure-as-code templates.

ListNetworkMigrationDefinitions.name: ListNetworkMigrationDefinitions
ListNetworkMigrationDefinitions.documentation: Lists all network migration definitions in the account, with optional filtering.

ListNetworkMigrationDeployedStacks.name: ListNetworkMigrationDeployedStacks
ListNetworkMigrationDeployedStacks.documentation: Lists CloudFormation stacks that have been deployed as part of the network migration.

ListNetworkMigrationDeployments.name: ListNetworkMigrationDeployments
ListNetworkMigrationDeployments.documentation: Lists network migration deployment jobs and their current status.

ListNetworkMigrationExecutions.name: ListNetworkMigrationExecutions
ListNetworkMigrationExecutions.documentation: Lists network migration execution instances for a given definition, showing the status and progress of each execution.

ListNetworkMigrationMapperSegmentConstru.name: ListNetworkMigrationMapperSegmentConstructs
ListNetworkMigrationMapperSegmentConstru.documentation: Lists constructs within a mapper segment, representing individual infrastructure components like VPCs, subnets, or security groups.

ListNetworkMigrationMapperSegments.name: ListNetworkMigrationMapperSegments
ListNetworkMigrationMapperSegments.documentation: Lists mapper segments, which represent logical groupings of network resources to be migrated together.

ListNetworkMigrationMappingUpdates.name: ListNetworkMigrationMappingUpdates
ListNetworkMigrationMappingUpdates.documentation: Lists mapping update jobs, which apply customer modifications to the generated network mappings.

ListNetworkMigrationMappings.name: ListNetworkMigrationMappings
ListNetworkMigrationMappings.documentation: Lists network migration mapping jobs, which analyze and create relationships between source and target network resources.

ListSourceServerActions.name: ListSourceServerActions
ListSourceServerActions.documentation: List source server post migration custom actions.

ListTagsForResource.name: ListTagsForResource
ListTagsForResource.documentation: List all tags for your Application Migration Service resources.

ListWaves.name: ListWaves
ListWaves.documentation: Retrieves all waves or multiple waves by ID.

MarkAsArchived.name: MarkAsArchived
MarkAsArchived.documentation: Archives specific Source Servers by setting the SourceServer.isArchived property to true for specified SourceServers by ID. This command only works for SourceServers with a lifecycle. state which equals DISCONNECTED or CUTOVER.

PutSourceServerAction.name: PutSourceServerAction
PutSourceServerAction.documentation: Put source server post migration custom action.

RemoveSourceServerAction.name: RemoveSourceServerAction
RemoveSourceServerAction.documentation: Remove source server post migration custom action.

RetryDataReplication.name: RetryDataReplication
RetryDataReplication.documentation: Causes the data replication initiation sequence to begin immediately upon next Handshake for specified SourceServer IDs, regardless of when the previous initiation started. This command will not work if the SourceServer is not stalled or is in a DISCONNECTED or STOPPED state.

StartCutover.name: StartCutover
StartCutover.documentation: Launches a Cutover Instance for specific Source Servers. This command starts a LAUNCH job whose initiatedBy property is StartCutover and changes the SourceServer.lifeCycle.state property to CUTTING_OVER.

StartImportFileEnrichment.name: StartImportFileEnrichment
StartImportFileEnrichment.documentation: Starts an import file enrichment job to process and enrich network migration import files with additional metadata and IP assignment strategies.

StartNetworkMigrationAnalysis.name: StartNetworkMigrationAnalysis
StartNetworkMigrationAnalysis.documentation: Starts a network migration analysis job to evaluate connectivity and compatibility of the migration mappings.

StartNetworkMigrationCodeGeneration.name: StartNetworkMigrationCodeGeneration
StartNetworkMigrationCodeGeneration.documentation: Starts a code generation job to convert network migration mappings into infrastructure-as-code templates.

StartNetworkMigrationDeployment.name: StartNetworkMigrationDeployment
StartNetworkMigrationDeployment.documentation: Starts a deployment job to create the target network infrastructure based on the generated code templates.

StartNetworkMigrationMapping.name: StartNetworkMigrationMapping
StartNetworkMigrationMapping.documentation: Starts the network migration mapping process for a given network migration execution.

StartNetworkMigrationMappingUpdate.name: StartNetworkMigrationMappingUpdate
StartNetworkMigrationMappingUpdate.documentation: Starts a job to apply customer modifications to network migration mappings, such as changing properties.

StartReplication.name: StartReplication
StartReplication.documentation: Start replication for source server irrespective of its replication type.

StartTest.name: StartTest
StartTest.documentation: Launches a Test Instance for specific Source Servers. This command starts a LAUNCH job whose initiatedBy property is StartTest and changes the SourceServer.lifeCycle.state property to TESTING.

TagResource.name: TagResource
TagResource.documentation: Adds or overwrites only the specified tags for the specified Application Migration Service resource or resources. When you specify an existing tag key, the value is overwritten with the new value. Each resource can have a maximum of 50 tags. Each tag consists of a key and optional value.

TerminateTargetInstances.name: TerminateTargetInstances
TerminateTargetInstances.documentation: Starts a job that terminates specific launched EC2 Test and Cutover instances. This command will not work for any Source Server with a lifecycle.state of TESTING, CUTTING_OVER, or CUTOVER.

UntagResource.name: UntagResource
UntagResource.documentation: Deletes the specified set of tags from the specified set of Application Migration Service resources.

UpdateLaunchConfiguration.name: UpdateLaunchConfiguration
UpdateLaunchConfiguration.documentation:
Updates multiple LaunchConfigurations by Source Server ID.

bootMode valid values are LEGACY_BIOS | UEFI

UpdateLaunchConfigurationTemplate.name: UpdateLaunchConfigurationTemplate
UpdateLaunchConfigurationTemplate.documentation: Updates an existing Launch Configuration Template by ID.

UpdateNetworkMigrationDefinition.name: UpdateNetworkMigrationDefinition
UpdateNetworkMigrationDefinition.documentation: Updates an existing network migration definition with new source or target configurations.

UpdateNetworkMigrationMapperSegment.name: UpdateNetworkMigrationMapperSegment
UpdateNetworkMigrationMapperSegment.documentation: Updates a mapper segment's configuration, such as changing its scope tags.

UpdateReplicationConfiguration.name: UpdateReplicationConfiguration
UpdateReplicationConfiguration.documentation: Allows you to update multiple ReplicationConfigurations by Source Server ID.

UpdateSourceServerReplicationType.name: UpdateSourceServerReplicationType
UpdateSourceServerReplicationType.documentation:
Allows you to change between the AGENT_BASED replication type and the SNAPSHOT_SHIPPING replication type.

SNAPSHOT_SHIPPING should be used for agentless replication.

AccessDeniedException.documentation: Operating denied due to a file permission or access check error.

totalSourceServers.documentation: Application aggregated status total source servers amount.

cores.documentation: The number of CPU cores on the source server.

sourceServerID.documentation: The request to change the source server migration lifecycle state by source server ID.

lifeCycle.documentation: The request to change the source server migration lifecycle state.

accountID.documentation: The request to change the source server migration account ID.

state.documentation: The request to change the source server migration lifecycle state.

ChangeServerLifeCycleStateSourceServerLi.documentation: The request to change the source server migration lifecycle state.

Checksum.documentation: A checksum structure used to verify data integrity.

tags.documentation: Request to associate tags during creation of a Launch Configuration Template.

description.documentation: A description of the network migration definition.

sourceConfigurations.documentation: A list of source configurations for the network migration.

targetS3Configuration.documentation: The S3 configuration for storing the target network artifacts.

targetNetwork.documentation: The target network configuration including topology and CIDR ranges.

targetDeployment.documentation: The target deployment configuration for the migrated network.

tags.documentation: Tags to assign to the network migration definition.

scopeTags.documentation: Scope tags for the network migration definition to control access and organization.

stagingAreaSubnetId.documentation: Request to configure the Staging Area subnet ID during Replication Settings template creation.

associateDefaultSecurityGroup.documentation: Request to associate the default Application Migration Service Security group with the Replication Settings template.

replicationServersSecurityGroupsIDs.documentation: Request to configure the Replication Server Security group ID during Replication Settings template creation.

ebsEncryption.documentation: Request to configure EBS encryption during Replication Settings template creation.

bandwidthThrottling.documentation: Request to configure bandwidth throttling during Replication Settings template creation.

createPublicIP.documentation: Request to create Public IP during Replication Settings template creation.

stagingAreaTags.documentation: Request to configure Staging Area tags during Replication Settings template creation.

useFipsEndpoint.documentation: Request to use Fips Endpoint during Replication Settings template creation.

tags.documentation: Request to configure tags during Replication Settings template creation.

internetProtocol.documentation: Request to configure the internet protocol to IPv4 or IPv6.

storeSnapshotOnLocalZone.documentation: Request to store snapshot on local zone during Replication Settings template creation.

lagDuration.documentation: Request to query data replication lag duration.

etaDateTime.documentation: Request to query the time when data replication will be complete.

dataReplicationState.documentation: Request to query the data replication state.

dataReplicationInitiation.documentation: Request to query whether data replication has been initiated.

rescannedStorageBytes.documentation: Request to query amount of data rescanned in bytes.

backloggedStorageBytes.documentation: Request to query data replication backlog size in bytes.

ImportFileEnrichment.documentation: Details about an import file enrichment job.

ImportFileEnrichmentStatus.documentation: The status of an import file enrichment job. Can be PENDING, STARTED, FAILED, SUCCEEDED, or SUCCEEDED_WITH_WARNINGS.

retryAfterSeconds.documentation: The server encountered an unexpected condition that prevented it from fulfilling the request. The request will be retried again after x seconds.

InternalServerException.documentation: The server encountered an unexpected condition that prevented it from fulfilling the request.

IpAssignmentStrategy.documentation: The strategy for assigning IP addresses during the enrichment process. STATIC assigns fixed IP addresses, while DYNAMIC allows for dynamic IP allocation.

jobID.documentation: Job ID.

sourceServerID.documentation: Job Event Source Server ID.

maxAttemptsCount.documentation: The maximum number of retries that will be attempted if this operation failed.
